createComplaint.brandSub: Help us make your city better by reporting issues directly to the right department.
createComplaint.s1Sub: Give us a clear description of the problem
createComplaint.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Broken streetlight on MG Road
createComplaint.descPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail — where exactly, how severe, how long it's been happening...
createComplaint.s2Sub: Help us route your complaint to the right team
createComplaint.s3Sub: Add evidence and confirm your location
createComplaint.clickUpload: Click to upload photos or videos
createComplaint.upToFiles: Up to {{max}} files · Images or Videos
createComplaint.required: Please fill in all required fields.
createComplaint.noLocation: Location not captured. Please allow GPS access.

notification.title: Notifications
notification.subtitle: Stay updated on your complaint activity
notification.emptySub: You'll be notified when your complaint status changes

chatbot.title: CivicBot
chatbot.offline: Offline — complaints will sync when connected

voice.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in your browser.
voice.failed: Voice input failed. Please type your message.
voice.unclear: I could not hear clearly. Please try again or type.
voice.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow mic access.
voice.noSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again.

register.intro:
📋 Describe your complaint in detail.
You can type or use the 🎤 mic button to speak.

Example: "Water leakage near the school on main road"
register.locationConfirm: Type YES to use it or NO to enter manually.
register.locationPermission: Permission denied — please allow location in browser settings.
register.locationUnavailable: Position unavailable — GPS signal not found.
register.locationTimeout: Timed out — location took too long.
register.locationLandmark: 📝 Add a landmark or street name (or press Enter to skip):
register.analyzed: ✅ I analyzed your complaint. Please confirm the details below.
register.conflict: ⚠️ Multiple departments detected. Please confirm the suggestion below.
register.confirm: Type YES to submit or NO to cancel.
register.savedOffline:
📡 You're offline.
Your complaint has been saved locally.
It will be submitted automatically when you're back online.
register.savedFallback:
⚠️ Submission failed. Saved locally.
Will retry automatically when connection is restored.
register.invalidPriority: Please type: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or EMERGENCY
register.priorityPrompt: ⚠️ What is the priority? Type: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or EMERGENCY
register.yesNo: Please type YES to submit or NO to cancel.
register.autoDetectFailed: Could not auto-detect. Please type the location next.
register.editPriority: No problem. What priority should this be? (LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH / EMERGENCY)

track.failed: Could not fetch status. Please try again.
track.invalidId: Please enter a valid complaint ID.
track.another: Would you like to track another complaint?

faq.intro: ❓ Ask me anything about our services!
faq.failed: Sorry, I could not find an answer right now.

sync.failed: complaint(s) failed to sync. Will retry when online.

chatbot.menu_greeting: 👋 Hi! I am CivicBot. How can I help you today?
